name: 18_Image_Enhancement_SRGAN_DIV2K_DL
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kuboresha picha kwa kutumia mfano wa SRGAN (unaweza kupata SRGAN iliyofunzwa awali [hapa](https://github.com/tensorlayer/srgan)) na seti ya data ya DIV2K, ambayo inaweza kupakuliwa kutoka [kiungo hiki](https://data.vision.ee.ethz.ch/cvl/DIV2K/). Seti ya data inapaswa kupakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`. Mfumo unapaswa kusindika picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia mfano uliyojifunza awali uliowekwa chini ya `models/saved_models/` kuokoa muda, na hifadhi picha zilizoboreshwa kwenye saraka ya `results/figures/`. Aidha, mfumo unapaswa kuonyesha na kuhifadhi kulinganisha kati ya picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kwenye `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`. Hatimaye, unda ripoti ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo kwenye seti tofauti za sampuli ili kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano kwenye aina mbalimbali za picha, na ihifadhi kama `results/report.md`. Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha kulinganisha kwa kina kwa utendaji wa mfano kwenye sampuli hizi zilizochaguliwa, ikionyesha pale ambapo mfano unafanya vizuri au unapata changamoto.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "DIV2K" imepakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "SRGAN" uliyojifunza awali umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.
Usindikaji wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda maalum `results/figures/`.
Kulinganisha kwa picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kunaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`.
Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Seti tofauti za sampuli zinapaswa kuchaguliwa ili kuonyesha utendaji wa mfano kwenye aina mbalimbali za picha.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha kulinganisha kwa kina kwa utendaji wa mfano kwenye sampuli hizi zilizochaguliwa, ikionyesha pale ambapo mfano unafanya vizuri au unapata changamoto.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "DIV2K" imepakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The code in `src/data_loader.py` does not contain any actual implementation for loading the DIV2K dataset. It only contains placeholder functions (`load_dataset`, `build_transforms`) and requirement definitions. There is no code that downloads, reads, or processes DIV2K image data, nor does it reference any dataset paths or libraries (like torchvision datasets) that would load DIV2K. The file is a minimal semantic placeholder for judging, not a functional dataset loader.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "SRGAN" uliyojifunza awali umehifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The workspace structure shows a `models/saved_models` directory exists, and trajectory evidence confirms the successful saving of `srgan_generator.pth` to that path without any reported errors or issues. The operation was completed robustly, indicating the trained SRGAN model is properly stored.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` does not implement image preprocessing, including resizing and normalization. The file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with a `build_transforms()` function that returns a list of strings `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` but does not contain any actual image processing logic. The trajectory evidence further indicates that during execution, the data loader encountered errors (KeyError) and warnings (UserWarning) related to data structure mismatches and data type conversion issues when attempting to perform resizing and normalization, confirming that the preprocessing was not successfully implemented.

judge_stats.criteria: Picha zilizoboreshwa zimehifadhiwa kwenye folda maalum `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is not satisfied because the key evidence shows an error when attempting to read the image file `enhanced_comparison.png`. The error message indicates "No endpoints found that support image input" (404 error), which suggests the file either does not exist, is corrupted, or cannot be accessed properly. While the trajectory evidence indicates that previous `savefig` operations succeeded without errors, the direct evidence from the project's current state shows a failure to access the specific image file meant to be stored in the `results/figures/` folder. Therefore, the condition that enhanced images are successfully saved in that folder is not met.

judge_stats.criteria: Kulinganisha kwa picha za asili na zilizoboreshwa kunaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/enhanced_comparison.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement to display and save the comparison image is not satisfied. The key evidence shows that attempting to read the file `enhanced_comparison.png` results in a 404 error, indicating the file either does not exist, is corrupted, or is in an unsupported format. While the trajectory suggests the `savefig` operation executed without reported errors, the actual file content check reveals a failure, meaning the saved image is not accessible or valid for the intended purpose of comparison.

judge_stats.criteria: Faili ya Markdown yenye matokeo na vielelezo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.md`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The `results/report.md` file exists but its content is shown as `('placeholder', None)`, indicating it is empty or contains only placeholder text. The requirement is for a Markdown file with results and metrics, which implies it should contain actual evaluation data, not just a placeholder.
